title: How Do I Create a Service Mesh with IPv4/IPv6 Dual Stack Enabled

title: How Do I Disable Sidecar Injection for Workloads?

reasons: Image displays a code editor showing a YAML configuration snippet.
It highlights the 'annotations' field containing 'sidecar.istio.io/inject: false', which directly corresponds to the documentation instructions for service meshes earlier than 1.13.
Image displays a code editor showing a YAML configuration snippet.
It highlights the 'sidecar.istio.io/inject: false' entry under the 'labels' field, which directly corresponds to the documentation instructions for service meshes 1.13 or later.

title: Authenticating JWT Requests on the Ingress Gateway Using ASM

reasons: Image shows the JWT tool website with the Algorithm set to RS512, matching step 1.a.
Image shows the public key in the Verify Signature area, which is required for obtaining the public key.

results.hard_fail_reason: The 'submit' button is blue, not magenta or plain white.
reasons: Image shows the JWK to PEM Convertor tool with PEM-to-JWK (RSA Only) selected.
Image shows the public key input and the submit button, matching step 1.b.

results.hard_fail_reason: The 'OK' button is red, not magenta or plain white.
reasons: Image shows the JWT Authentication configuration form in the ASM console.
Image shows the Issuer, Audiences, and JWKS fields, matching step 2.c.
Image shows the JWT tool with Header alg set to RS512, Payload iss set to test, and aud set to ASM.
Image matches the configuration described in step 1 of Checking Whether JWT Authentication Takes Effect.
